title: clerodendrum silvanum
intro: Clerodendrum silvanum, also known as the forest glorybower or silver glorybower, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Clerodendrum silvanum has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum silvanum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum silvanum may be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
